allow: Bash(node -e "process.env.SUPABASE_URL='http://x'; process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY='x'; process.env.NODE_ENV='development'; process.env.BRIDGE_REQUIRE_AUTH='false'; process.env.PORT='3099'; const m = require\('./whatsapp-bridge/bridge-server.js'\); setTimeout\(\(\)=>process.exit\(0\),1500\)")
